scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend" "wait-on tcp:3001 tcp:5173 && npm run start --workspace apps/desktop"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --workspace apps/backend && npm run build --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
